{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400314555B4FBD08FF50961AAA9"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353319218181653258","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的故事情节十分吸引人，将《西游记》中的唐僧师徒与历史上真实的玄奘和他的弟子联系起来，感觉很新奇。而且书中对人性的刻画很深刻，让我联想到了《水浒传》，都是通过故事来展现人性的复杂。很期待后面的案情发展，看看玄奘师徒如何在这九九八十一案中勘破谜团。","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":16,"text":"西游记","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742835050961AAA9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227353319218181653258%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227315343460641295422%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":75,"s":72,"text":"水浒传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B0%B4%E6%B5%92%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742835050961AAA9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227353319218181653258%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227315343460641295422%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B0%B4%E6%B5%92%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709828809,"group_id":"7315343460641295422","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxop4Kf8xYkdBkkbZZi5+1Q=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"257758633145865","user_name":"喜欢微型猪的魔尼尼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"257758633145865","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7315343460641295422","book_info":{"abstract":"《西游记》中唐僧师徒经历的九九八十一难，实为八十一案，这些案环环相扣，连绵不绝，穷尽了人世间罪案的种类，案案直指人性深处的贪婪，自私，恶。
大唐贞观三年（公元629年），春三月，霍邑（今山西霍县）县衙远远走来一名僧人，这僧人年有三十，眉目慈和，仿佛眼内的一切都让他充满了喜悦。
他叫玄奘。他的身后，跟着一个满脸大胡子、高鼻深目、肤色黝黑、偏生裹着白色头巾的西域胡人。这胡人身材高大，背着个大包袱，一路上东张西望，活泼有趣。他是玄奘的大弟子天竺人波罗叶。
这一前一后走来的二人，便是名著《西游记》中唐僧和孙悟空的真实原型。从踏入霍邑第一步起，他们便注定卷入整个西游阴谋与诡案的核心——十八层泥犁地狱，这座地狱是局亦是饵，是人世间所有的罪恶，是九九八十一案的起点，更是大唐国祚得以延续289年的历史绝密。
这座地狱大门早已开启，只待玄奘师徒入局见证……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3e5a5981c6335ab715ddf1a483eeeff4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"陈渐","author_id":"","book_id":"7315343460641295422","book_name":"西游八十一案：大唐泥犁狱","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1.2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7477813334645935129","read_count":"83","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"206695"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"25","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3e5a5981c6335ab715ddf1a483eeeff4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779467505&x-signature=Ge0aZh4MsEvS%2BPdlLbOaFYXpxKg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400314555B4FBD08FF50961AAA9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读36分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2160,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":880},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7403940313592349465","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一切缘法，如梦幻泡影，如露亦如电，如真亦作假。真正的东西，在人心吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723867619,"group_id":"7315343460641295422","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000
